heading: Key features built for operational clarity
description: Nine integrated modules — from visibility and reconciliation to maintenance, incidents, and ERP integration.
platform_description: All modules included in every Footprints deployment
image_alt: Footprints asset tracking dashboard by Tag RoBo Tech

modules.title: Item visibility & tracking
modules.description: You can view geo location where asset was last traced.

modules.title: Auto reconciliation
modules.description: Reconciliation can be done between book data and physical count.

modules.title: Physical condition monitoring
modules.description: Not working assets can be identified.

modules.title: Incident management
modules.description: Log of past breakdown can be retrieved including repair details.

modules.title: Location mapping
modules.description: Current location of item can be traced.

modules.title: Manual retrieval
modules.description: If you wish to retrieve any data point such as machine manual, this can be done very conveniently.
